Lock the evidence pack CLI UX and on-disk layout before implementation.

---

- Avoid file sprawl.
- Avoid copying entire source documents into git.
- Keep the join-key contract: evidence pack should be discoverable from thread id.

---

# Acceptance criteria
- [ ] CLI UX and default paths decided

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.2.2","title":"Task: Implement evidence commands (init/add/list/render)","description":"# Goal
Implement the evidence pack CLI commands.

---

# Minimum deliverable
- Evidence pack file can be created for a thread id
- Sources + excerpts can be appended
- Render output is stable and includes anchor IDs

---

# Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Commands implemented and documented in `brenner --help`
- [ ] Evidence pack render output is deterministic

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.2.5","title":"Task: Add CLI evidence post helper (render + send Agent Mail message)","description":"# Goal
Reduce friction for using evidence packs in real sessions by providing a **one-command** helper to publish evidence into the Agent Mail thread.

---

# Why this matters
If evidence lives only on disk, agents won’t see it unless the operator manually copy/pastes.
The easiest low-friction workflow is:
1) build/update evidence pack on disk
2) render a clean markdown summary
3) post it into the thread as an `EVIDENCE:` message

---

# Proposed UX
```bash
# Render + send in one step
./brenner.ts evidence post \
  --thread-id RS-... \
  --sender Operator \
  --to BlueLake,PurpleMountain,RedForest \
  --evidence-id EV-001,EV-002
```

Behavior:
- renders the selected evidence records (or all by default)
- sends via Agent Mail with a stable subject prefix (e.g. `EVIDENCE:`)

---

# Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Command exists (or subcommand under `evidence`)
- [ ] Output is deterministic and suitable for thread context
- [ ] Clear failure modes (missing evidence id, missing pack)
","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownSnow","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:44:01.476600248-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T04:08:28.108991459-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T04:08:28.108991459-05:00","close_reason":"Added evidence post command to render + send evidence packs as EVIDENCE messages, with a dry-run mode and CLI tests.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.2.5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:44:01.477886919-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.2.5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:44:12.016579362-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.3","title":"Feature: Artifact schema + linter support evidence pack citations","description":"# Goal
Allow canonical artifacts and deltas to reference external evidence records (per `brenner_bot-aly1`) with stable IDs.

---

# Requirements
- Artifact schema spec documents allowed citation/reference formats:
  - evidence IDs: `EV-001`
  - evidence anchors: `EV-001#E1`
- Delta format optionally supports `evidence_refs` on relevant operations.
- Linter validates:
  - reference syntax is well-formed
  - (optionally) referenced evidence IDs exist in the session evidence pack

---

# Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Artifacts can include evidence references without being flagged invalid
- [ ] Linter catches malformed evidence refs
- [ ] Renderer preserves evidence refs verbatim
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:08:28.923623194-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-01T14:30:18.035170789-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-01T14:30:18.035170789-05:00","close_reason":"All 4 subtasks completed: artifact schema updated (5so.13.3.1), linter accepts evidence citations (5so.13.3.2), citation parsing tests added (5so.13.3.3), role prompt templates updated (5so.13.3.4)","labels":["artifact-schema","citations","lint"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.3","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:08:28.944011036-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.3","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:08:28.949721667-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.13.3.1","title":"Task: Update artifact schema spec for evidence citations","description":"# Goal
Update the protocol documentation so artifact writers know how to cite topic evidence.

---

# Likely change
- Either bump schema to v0.2, or add an additive appendix to v0.1.
- Document citation formats:
  - Brenner: `§n`
  - Evidence pack: `S1.E2`
  - (optional) code citations

---

# Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Spec includes examples and provenance rules
